VENUS+DRAGON
HEAD+ JUPITER She will be a repenting type for
deeds committed either due to
innocence or ignorance, quite a

VENUS+DRAGON
HEAD+ SATURN Possessing beautiful physical

NOTE

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY 39
If Venus is posited in between the signs of Dragon Head
and Dragon Tail, then it indicates that wife suffers due to
endangering situations. For Venus, on adjacent sides (or signs)
besides in 7th aspect, if there are no planets, then at her ages of
19, 22 1/2, 27, 32, and 42 1/2, she\ will have to perform HOMA
FOR AYUR-SHANTHI (OR AYURSHANTHI HOMA).
VENUS+DRAGON
TAIL+SUN Wife enj oys name and fame in social
circles. But husband will have a
suspicious eye on her.
VENUS+DRAGON
TAIL+MOON Wife will be an expert in
embroidery and artistic lines.
